display.purpose: Hero <h1> title only. One per page. Bricolage Grotesque 800. Solid var(--fg), no gradient.

heading.purpose: Section <h2> titles. Bricolage Grotesque 800. One per section.

title.purpose: Sub-sections, card headings, feature titles. Bricolage Grotesque 700.

body.purpose: Paragraph copy. Syne 400. Frost-2 color. Cap at 62ch.

label.purpose: Section eyebrows, nav links, chip text, timestamps, stat labels. Space Mono, all-caps. The precision signal.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Primary easing for all state transitions, reveal animations, and interactive feedback.

components.name: Fire Button (Primary CTA)
components.description: Primary call-to-action. Pill-shaped, fire-orange fill. All major CTAs on the site.
components.css: .ds-btn-fire { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.8rem 1.9rem; min-height: 46px; background: #e25c1c; color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.70rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.13em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-fire:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 6px 32px rgba(226,92,28,0.55); } .ds-btn-fire:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #e25c1c; outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-btn-fire:active { transform: translateY(0); }

components.name: Discord Button
components.description: Discord CTA only. Never used for non-Discord actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-discord { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.8rem 1.9rem; min-height: 46px; background: #5865f2; color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.70rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.13em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-discord:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 6px 32px rgba(88,101,242,0.55); } .ds-btn-discord:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #5865f2; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Glass Button (Ghost)
components.description: Ghost variant. Secondary CTAs. Transparent glass fill, line-bright border.
components.css: .ds-btn-glass { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.8rem 1.9rem; min-height: 46px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.045); color: rgba(240,232,236,0.85); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.14); border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.70rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.13em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: color 200ms, border-color 200ms, transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-glass:hover { color: #e25c1c; border-color: rgba(226,92,28,0.55); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-glass:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #e25c1c; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Glass Card
components.description: Primary container. Liquid Glass surface with cursor-reactive specular. Never nested.
components.html:
INFRASTRUCTURE

Highway Network

Over 1.2 million blocks of highway connecting the Nether.
components.css: .ds-glass-card { position: relative; padding: 2.5rem; border-radius: 28px; background: radial-gradient(circle 180px at var(--gx,-400px) var(--gy,-400px), rgba(255,255,255,0.11), transparent 60%), linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,130,90,0.07), rgba(100,160,255,0.04)), rgba(255,255,255,0.045); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.10); border-top-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.28); backdrop-filter: blur(24px) saturate(1.5); overflow: hidden; } .ds-glass-card__label { font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.62rem; letter-spacing: 0.28em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #e25c1c; margin: 0 0 0.8rem; } .ds-glass-card__title { font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque', sans-serif; font-size: 1.8rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -0.022em; color: #f0e8ec; margin: 0 0 0.75rem; } .ds-glass-card__body { font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.78; color: rgba(240,232,236,0.60); margin: 0; }

components.name: Member Tag — Leader
components.description: Roster tag for leadership members. Fire-tinted border and text.
components.css: .ds-member-leader { display: inline-block; padding: 0.45rem 1.05rem; border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(226,92,28,0.09); border: 1px solid rgba(226,92,28,0.35); color: #e25c1c; font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.70rem; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-decoration: none; transition: transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), box-shadow 200ms; } .ds-member-leader:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(226,92,28,0.25); border-color: rgba(226,92,28,0.65); color: #f5a620; } .ds-member-leader:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #e25c1c; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Member Tag — Member
components.description: Roster tag for regular members. Glass fill, fire highlight on hover.
components.css: .ds-member-tag { display: inline-block; padding: 0.45rem 1.05rem; border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.045); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.14); color: rgba(240,232,236,0.85); font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.70rem; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-decoration: none; transition: transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), color 200ms, border-color 200ms, box-shadow 200ms; } .ds-member-tag:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); color: #e25c1c; border-color: rgba(226,92,28,0.40); box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(226,92,28,0.18); } .ds-member-tag:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #e25c1c; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Tag / Chip
components.description: Inline metadata label inside cards. Pill shape, Space Mono. Variants: fire, discord, lava, coal.
components.css: .ds-tag { display: inline-block; padding: 0.28rem 0.8rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.14); color: rgba(240,232,236,0.60); font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.60rem; letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-tag--fire { border-color: rgba(226,92,28,0.40); color: rgba(226,92,28,0.85); } .ds-tag--discord { border-color: rgba(88,101,242,0.40); color: rgba(88,101,242,0.85); } .ds-tag--lava { border-color: rgba(192,57,26,0.40); color: rgba(192,57,26,0.85); } .ds-tag--coal { color: #a8684d; border-color: rgba(61,26,14,0.40); }

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.description: Fixed 64px glass nav bar. Transparent by default, frosted glass on scroll.
components.html:
THM
AboutMembers
components.css: .ds-nav { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 64px; display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 0 2rem; gap: 2rem; z-index: 100; transition: background 300ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), border-color 300ms; border-bottom: 1px solid transparent; } .ds-nav--scrolled { background: rgba(7,4,7,0.82); backdrop-filter: blur(32px) saturate(1.6); border-bottom-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); } .ds-nav__logo { font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque', sans-serif; font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 800; color: #f0e8ec; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav__links { display: flex; gap: 0.25rem; margin-left: auto; } .ds-nav__link { font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.68rem; letter-spacing: 0.10em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(240,232,236,0.60); text-decoration: none; padding: 0.4rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 9999px; transition: color 150ms, background 150ms; } .ds-nav__link:hover { color: #f0e8ec; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); } .ds-nav__link--active { color: #e25c1c; }

narrative.overview:
The Nether is hostile by default, navigable by force of labor and organization. The Highway Men's visual system lives in that tension: a dark, pressurized environment where every surface floats above an atmospheric void, every accent carries heat, and order is something you impose by showing up every day and moving blocks. Nothing is decorative here. What reads as aesthetic is a direct translation of what THM does — precision infrastructure in an environment that wants to kill you.

Glass surfaces are suspended layers over a breathing atmospheric background that catches light from the fire-toned gradients beneath. Typography is editorial and structural: Bricolage Grotesque was chosen for its blunt variable-weight capability and editorial personality (replacing the clichéd Bebas Neue), Space Mono signals precision and record-keeping, and Syne bridges them. Hierarchy is created through scale and contrast, not decoration. The system explicitly rejects generic gaming-clan aesthetics and corporate SaaS landing-page patterns.
keyCharacteristics: Near-black void (#070407) base — slightly warm tint, not pure black
Liquid Glass surfaces: cursor-reactive specular highlight, iridescent rim, backdrop-filter: blur(24px) saturate(1.5)
Three-tier heat palette: Fire Orange (primary CTA), Lava Red (secondary), Ember Gold (highlights)
Bricolage Grotesque 800 for impact display; Space Mono for precision labels; Syne for readable body
Dark and Light mode with saved preference; light mode is warm cream (#f7f1e9)
prefers-reduced-motion honored on all animations; content never gated on JS class triggers

rules.name: The Heat Hierarchy Rule
rules.body: Fire Orange is for action. Lava Red is for emphasis. Ember Gold is for atmosphere. They do not swap roles.

rules.name: The Discord Quarantine Rule
rules.body: Discord Blurple (#5865F2) appears only on Discord CTAs. Applying it anywhere else corrupts the heat palette.

rules.name: The Alpha Tint Rule
rules.body: All semi-transparent variants of brand colors are intentional system values: rgba(226,92,28,X) = Fire tint, rgba(192,57,26,X) = Lava tint, rgba(88,101,242,X) = Discord tint.

rules.name: The Gradient Ban
rules.body: Gradient text (-webkit-background-clip: text) is not used anywhere in this system. Solid var(--fg) only.

rules.name: The Mono-Label Contract
rules.body: Space Mono is exclusively for labels, chips, dates, and navigation — never for body prose or headings.

rules.name: The Atmospheric Dependency Rule
rules.body: Never disable .bg-canvas and expect glass cards to look intentional. The glass system requires the fire-toned atmospheric layer beneath it.

rules.name: The No-Shadow Rule
rules.body: box-shadow is not used for card depth. Depth comes from glass and atmosphere, not painted-on shadows.

dos: Do use Bricolage Grotesque 700–800 for all headings and display text.
Do use Space Mono for all label, chip, nav link, eyebrow, and timestamp text.
Do start every page with .bg-canvas (the atmospheric gradient layer).
Do apply backdrop-filter with @supports guard. The fallback must be declared first.
Do use the cursor-reactive specular via --gx/--gy on all .glass elements.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion. Every animation must have a fallback.
Do size all interactive tap targets to minimum 44x44px (min-height: 46px on buttons).
Do include Dark and Light mode. The theme toggle must store preference in localStorage.
donts: Don't use gradient text (-webkit-background-clip: text with a gradient). Solid var(--fg) only.
Don't use box-shadow for card depth. Depth comes from glass and the atmospheric layer.
Don't use Bebas Neue. It was replaced by Bricolage Grotesque.
Don't add a fourth accent color. The Fire / Lava / Ember triad is complete.
Don't apply glassmorphism decoratively. Every .glass element must have purposeful content.
Don't use generic gaming-clan aesthetics: no HUD overlays, no neon green on black.
Don't use SaaS landing-page patterns: no hero-metric stat-card grids, no 'join the waitlist' copy.
Don't nest glass cards. One level only.
Don't use --ease-spring (removed from v2). Use --ease-out: cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1).
